rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear rationale for each change, improving the structure significantly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively marked confidence and uncertainties, adding explicit scope statements and clarifications.
rationale.RX.3: The output adhered strictly to the agreed scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced, and potential issues were identified proactively.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations, so it didn't meet the highest standard.
